title: antirrhinum majus var. ochroleucum
intro: Antirrhinum majus var. ochroleucum, also known as the yellow snapdragon, is a variety of the antirrhinum majus plant, belonging to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus var. ochroleucum include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce fever, and act as a natural expectorant, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
